summary: Drug advertising is restricted; Rx drugs must not be promoted to consumers and claims must match MFDS approval.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Drug cure, Rx promotion, or unapproved drug efficacy claims. ACTION: REJECT — remove prohibited pharmaceutical ads. CHECK: MFDS approval, OTC/Rx status, and permitted labeling. ESCALATE IF: Public Rx ad or unapproved indication claim.
